name: Anaplan, Inc.
description: Anaplan is a leading AI-driven scenario planning and analysis platform designed to optimize decision-making in today’s complex business environment. By connecting data, people, and processes across organizational silos, the company enables enterprises to navigate uncertainty, improve forecasting accuracy, and align strategic, financial, and operational plans. With a focus on predictive, generative, and agentic AI, Anaplan provides a scalable, cloud-native solution that helps businesses outpace competition, accelerate time to insight, and drive better outcomes across finance, sales, supply chain, and workforce functions.
